positive: A mesmerizing stylized illustration of a mythological glowing moth resting on a stylized celestial crescent moon. The moth features intricate, detailed wings with bioluminescent patterns in deep indigo, emerald green, and soft gold accents. The composition is perfectly centered, featuring dramatic, elegant silhouettes of blooming lotus flowers and ethereal winding vines wrapping around the moth and moon. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and minimalist graphic design, utilizing thick, clean lines and negative space for high contrast. The lighting is dramatic chiaroscuro, with the glowing moth providing the sole source of magical, soft volumetric light. Color palette should be limited to deep jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, teal) against a dark midnight background, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, vector-art aesthetic, seamless pattern potential, central subject focus.
